subject: WM-0153 ready for client implementation
body: WM-0153 is ready after WM-0152 main merge/push at 7dc4fc4. Worktree: D:\\WebProjects\\WumingTown-WM-0153. Branch: task/WM-0153-first-play-guidance-localization-and-responsive-. Scope: first-play guidance, zh-CN/en/system-language behavior, window/fullscreen responsive repair, secondary settings/diagnostics, accessibility/readability around the real WM-0152 lamp/build command chain. Do not touch Simulation Worker or sim-core logic, do not claim unavailable controls, and preserve release/EA/store/signing/telemetry/accounts/public-save gates. Read AGENTS/workflow/task docs, run validate/status, claim as client-engineer, write coordination/reports/WM-0153-plan.md before product edits, then implement and complete to reviewer after required checks.
